title: Traktör Tıkır Tıkır
description: Çiftlikte çalışkan bir traktörün günlük macerası. Hayvan seslerini ve çiftlik hayatını öğrenelim!
style: 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: a big friendly red tractor with cute round headlight eyes and a wide smiling grille
characterDescription.notes: Büyük, sevimli, kırmızı traktör karakteri, yuvarlak far gözleri ve güler yüzlü ızgarası var

outfit.description: wearing denim overalls with a bright red t-shirt underneath, small yellow rubber boots

scenes.title: Sabah Oldu
scenes.prompt: A beautiful farm at sunrise, golden sun rising over green rolling hills. A red barn, wooden fence, green fields. Roosters on the fence. Golden morning light rays spreading across the farm. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel golden-orange sunrise gradient background with subtle farm fence and hill silhouette patterns, gentle morning watercolor texture, fresh and bright atmosphere, children's book illustration style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Traktör Uyandı
scenes.prompt: A big friendly red tractor with cute round headlight eyes opening like waking up, and a wide smiling grille. The tractor is parked inside a wooden barn. Hay bales around. Morning sunlight streaming through barn doors. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel red-orange background with subtle gear and wheel patterns, gentle mechanical watercolor texture, energetic and cheerful atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Yola Çıktı
scenes.prompt: A big red tractor with a happy face driving down a dusty dirt road through green countryside. Dust clouds behind the tractor. Blue sky, white fluffy clouds, green fields on both sides. Dynamic movement feel. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, dynamic composition.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel brown-green background with subtle tire track and road patterns, gentle countryside watercolor texture, adventurous and open atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: İnekler
scenes.prompt: Three friendly black and white spotted cows standing in a green pasture behind a wooden fence. The red tractor stopped nearby. The cows have big friendly eyes and open mouths as if mooing. Daisies in the grass. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel green background with subtle cow spot and daisy patterns, gentle pastoral watercolor texture, friendly and calm atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Koyunlar
scenes.prompt: A group of fluffy white sheep with cute faces standing in a green meadow. Some lambs playing. The red tractor watching them from the road. Rolling green hills in the background. Soft white wool, blue sky. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel white-green background with subtle fluffy wool cloud and grass patterns, gentle soft watercolor texture, gentle and peaceful atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Horoz
scenes.prompt: A proud colorful rooster standing on top of a wooden fence post, head thrown back crowing loudly. Bright red comb and wattle, colorful green-blue tail feathers. The red tractor nearby. Morning farm scene. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel warm yellow background with subtle feather and sun ray patterns, gentle farm morning watercolor texture, bold and proud atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Tarla Sürme
scenes.prompt: A red tractor plowing a brown field, turning over dark rich soil in neat rows. Birds following behind the tractor picking worms. Wide open farmland, blue sky with white clouds. Hard working scene. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, wide angle.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel brown-earth background with subtle plowed line and soil patterns, gentle earthy watercolor texture, hardworking and productive atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Tohum Ekti
scenes.text:
Tohum ekti traktör.
"Pat pat pat!" düştü tohumlar.
scenes.prompt: A red tractor pulling a seed planter machine, small seeds falling into the plowed soil in a row. Close-up showing seeds dropping into the dark earth. Green fields in the distance. Hopeful farming scene. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel green-brown gradient background with subtle seed and sprout patterns, gentle growing watercolor texture, hopeful and nurturing atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Eve Dönüş
scenes.prompt: A red tractor driving back along a country road toward a red barn in the distance. Beautiful orange-pink sunset sky. Long shadows on the ground. The tractor looks tired but happy. Peaceful evening farm scene. 3D Pixar animated movie style, warm golden hour lighting, cinematic composition.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel sunset orange-pink gradient background with subtle road and barn silhouette patterns, gentle evening watercolor texture, peaceful and satisfied atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: İyi Geceler Traktör
scenes.text:
Traktör ahıra girdi.
"Tıkır tıkır..." dedi.
Uyudu traktör.
İyi geceler!
scenes.prompt: A red tractor parked inside a cozy wooden barn, headlight eyes closed as if sleeping peacefully. Hay bales around, a small mouse sleeping on one. Moonlight coming through a window. Stars visible outside. Warm cozy night scene. 3D Pixar animated movie style, warm soft lighting, peaceful cinematic scene.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel dark navy blue background with subtle star, moon, and barn silhouette patterns, gentle dreamy night watercolor texture, sleepy and cozy atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🚜
facts: Traktörler çiftliklerde toprak sürmek için kullanılır!
Traktörlerin büyük tekerlekleri çamurda batmaması içindir!

funFacts.title: Çiftlik Hayvanları 🐄
facts: Horozlar her sabah güneşi selamlamak için öter!
